author: @IndianaBoys
text:
Robert, meant to tell you this the other day,  for people to see your other travel videos, you will want to update the above link in your description:

youtube.com/user/BackpackingDiary

We can always count on you to bring us the interesting!

Cheers mate

author: @ThinkingandTinkering
text: Yeah i really love this - an think of thousands of things from this - somebody should set up a business i am sure there would be buyers

author: @MongrelShark
text: Awesome. Trash to treasure. Add a water storage tyre and you could have a capillary bed...
